nodes.description: name: Black Bean Wrap — Smoky Bake | short_description: Smoky black bean wrap with avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla—fiber-rich, plant-based, and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Toa
nodes.premise: Meal: Black Bean Wrap — Smoky Bake - name: Black Bean Wrap — Smoky Bake | short_description: Smoky black bean wrap with avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla—fiber-rich, plant-based, and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Toast the wrap for extra crispness and heat the filling until beans are warm. To boost protein, add extra black beans or sprinkle hemp seeds; for more smokiness, dust with smoked paprika or chipotle powder. Pair with a side of fruit or raw veggies to round out the meal. | nutrition_note: Good source of plant-based protein and fiber from black beans, plus healthy fats from avocado. Includes greens and whole grains for satiety; be mindful of sodium in store-bought salsa and wraps—opt for lower-sodium options if needed.

nodes.premise: Meal: Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap - name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap | short_description: Light soba noodle bowl with crisp vegetables, protein-rich egg, and a sesame-ginger dressing. | meal_suggestion: A balanced soba noodle bowl with cucumber, carrot, and egg, dressed in sesame-ginger dressing; can also be enjoyed wrapped in a tortilla for a wrap option. | nutrition_note: Balanced: egg provides high-quality protein; soba offers carbohydrates; cucumber and carrot add fiber and micronutrients; sesame dressing contributes healthy fats. If soba is not gluten-free, the dish contains gluten; use 100% buckwheat soba for a gluten-free option. Expect moderate sodium from the dressing.
